creator: yonas.yanfa@gmail.com
text:
Hi Thomas,

I'm trying to install traefik via `pkg install traefik` on FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p10 amd64.

Freshports shows this package is not available for FreeBSD 12 and FreeBSD 13. However, it is available for FreeBSD 11 and 14.

These are my settings:

# cat /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos/FreeBSD.conf

FreeBSD: {
  url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest",
  mirror_type: "srv",
  signature_type: "fingerprints",
  fingerprints: "/usr/share/keys/pkg",
  enabled: yes
}
